label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 4

extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won sprint finish after MILANO Sebastian went too early, timing kick perfectly from draft position
tactical_patterns: Roundabouts outside 3km caused late crash eliminating Bahrain sprinter EXACT and threatening GC riders showing positioning critical earlier than usual.
VANDERBERG Marin jumped intermediate sprint for points jersey points revealing EF targeting green jersey campaign not just stage hunting.
MILANO Sebastian launched too early in drag finish, demonstrating even powered sprinters miscalculate timing on stepped-up gradient finishes.

rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: appeared tiring mid-sprint but found second kick showing deceptive acceleration reserve on uphill drags
rider_signals.MILANO Sebastian: positive: UE Emirates now committing to sprint leadouts across terrain types suggesting broader ambitions than expected
rider_signals.EXACT: negative: caught in crash outside 3km marker losing stage opportunity showing Bahrain sprint train fragility
rider_signals.BUTRAGO Santiago: negative: involved in late crash threatening GC standing revealing positioning weakness in Bahrain GC team
rider_signals.VANDERBERG Marin: neutral: targeting intermediate points against VENDRAME suggests points jersey still competitive despite gap
